'''''Star Wars Monthly'' 159''' is the one hundred fifty-ninth issue of the ''[[Star Wars Monthly]]'' series of comic reprints, published in [[June]] [[1982]]. Starting with this issue, the series's title was changed from ''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly''. The numbering continued from the previous title.

This issue includes one of the few original comic stories in the series, "[[Blind Fury!]]". It was later reprinted and colorized in [[Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds 1|''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'' 1]].

==Contents==
*"[[Blind Fury!]]"
*[[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]]
*"Tales of the Watcher"
